a.xlink:title: Gets the hover reference. The current state is not used. Will call the on fail callback if the target...
Combined drone awareness handler, accessible to derived classes through the protected method.
Computes a target transform given a target adapter.
Validates that the target transform and the drone state are within the maximum euclidean distance.
Returns the single line adapter with the given id.
Returns the current target adapter, will have TARGET_TYPE_NONE if no target.
